daily.today_energy: Your intuition is having a major moment right now. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower trying to get your attention. The vibe is introspective but grounded.
daily.love: Someone's energy is shifting around you, and honestly? You're picking up on it before they even realize it themselves. Great time to have a real conversation or just sit with your feelings.
daily.career: Your creative juice is flowing, but you might feel torn between playing it safe or going rogue with an idea. The universe is giving you permission to be a little bold today.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for some calm. Whether that's journaling, a walk, or just putting your phone down—listen to what makes you feel steady and do that.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is running hot this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings that pop up unexpectedly—they're basically your internal GPS recalibrating. Something shifts in your favor by midweek, so stay open to plot twists.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Single? Someone's been lowkey noticing you. Either way, stop overthinking the vibes and just let things unfold naturally. Your energy is magnetic this week.
weekly.career: This is a creative surge moment. Whatever project's been sitting in your drafts deserves attention now. You're in your strategic era—use it to pitch ideas, set boundaries, or pivot toward something that actually energizes you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and gentleness. Consider it permission to slow down without guilt. Moving your body in ways that feel good (not obligatory) will boost your overall frequency. Hydration is clutch.
